infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Ojo uses your location to fetch local weather for outfit suggestions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Ojo uses your photo library so you can add images of your clothing items.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Ojo sends daily outfit suggestions and weather alerts to help you dress for the day.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Ojo uses your location for local weather.

plugins.photosPermission: Ojo uses your photo library to add clothing images.
